hindi: जय पितर देव श्राद्ध के। तर्पण और दान के॥
english: Victory to the Pitar Devas of the Shraddha; of oblations and charity
roman: Jai Pitar Dev Shraddh Ke, Tarpan Aur Daan Ke

hindi: श्राद्ध पक्ष में पितरों को। तर्पण करते भक्त जनों को॥
english: During Shraddha Paksha for the ancestors; devotees perform water oblations
roman: Shraddh Paksha Mein Pitron Ko, Tarpan Karte Bhakt Janon Ko

hindi: पितर तृप्त होते तर्पण से। घर में सुख आता कारण से॥
english: Ancestors are satisfied by the oblations; happiness comes home because of this
roman: Pitar Tripta Hote Tarpan Se, Ghar Mein Sukh Aata Karan Se

hindi: अमावस्या और पितृ पक्ष में। पिंड दान करते सब तक्ष में॥
english: On Amavasya and during Pitru Paksha; Pinda Daan is offered by all in the Taksha ritual
roman: Amavasya Aur Pitru Paksha Mein, Pind Daan Karte Sab Taksha Mein

hindi: गया में श्राद्ध करने जाते। पितरों को मोक्ष दिलाते॥
english: They go to Gaya to perform Shraddha; granting liberation to their ancestors
roman: Gaya Mein Shraddh Karne Jaate, Pitron Ko Moksha Dilaate

hindi: पितर चालीसा जो पढ़े। पितर तृप्ति और आशीर्वाद बढ़े॥
english: Whoever reads the Pitar Chalisa; ancestral satisfaction and blessings grow
roman: Pitar Chalisa Jo Padhe, Pitar Tripti Aur Ashirwad Badhe

hindi: जय जय पितर देव श्राद्धकर। भक्तन को दो आशीर्वाद सुंदर॥
english: Victory to the Pitar Devas of the Shraddha; give beautiful blessings to devotees
roman: Jai Jai Pitar Dev Shraddhakar, Bhaktan Ko Do Ashirwad Sundar
